title: [MTR] Trolleybus pack
body:
# MTR Trolleybus
It's a resource pack for [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod that adds trolleybuses.

**This pack requires [NTE](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) to be installed along with the MTR mod!**



## Vehicles
* ZiU-682V «‎ЗиУ-9»‎
* ZiU-682G-016.2 «‎Тролза»‎
* ZiU-682G-016.2 Restyling «‎Тролза с бронемордой»‎
* Trolza-6205 «‎Тролза-гармошка»‎
* Trolza-5265.08 «‎Тролза-Мегаполис»‎ (Has autonomous driving)

## How to use autonomous driving
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7O_j2-QA4pY

## Credits
* **[Oleg Faktor](https://vk.com/of_workshop_public)** — original models
* **bl.tmf** — porting of models
* **Marat Madiev** — scripting
